metadata.title: AWS official networking crypto policy analysis
metadata.source_policy: Facts are based on AWS official documentation. User-provided Excel/Word files were used only to understand desired field granularity and display style.
scope: Elastic Load Balancing - Application Load Balancer (ALB)
Elastic Load Balancing - Network Load Balancer (NLB)
metadata.why_v2: Adds policy-level entries for CloudFront, ALB, and NLB, with protocol support, risk assessment, recommended usage, and API endpoint.

field_schema.label: Policy name
field_schema.description: Selectable security policy or equivalent configuration value from AWS official docs.

field_schema.label: API endpoint / configuration field
field_schema.description: API, CLI, or CloudFormation field for configuring or querying the value.

field_schema.label: Supported protocols
field_schema.description: Whether the policy supports TLSv1.3, TLSv1.2, TLSv1.1, TLSv1.0, or SSLv3.

field_schema.label: Cipher risk profile
field_schema.description: Summarized cipher characteristics from AWS policy/cipher tables.

service_summaries.primary_crypto_configuration: ViewerCertificate.MinimumProtocolVersion; ViewerProtocolPolicy; OriginProtocolPolicy; OriginSslProtocols; field-level encryption
service_summaries.note: CloudFront uses its own viewer security policy names. Main controls are minimum protocol version plus viewer/origin HTTPS.

service_summaries.service_name: Elastic Load Balancing - Application Load Balancer (ALB)
service_summaries.note: Console default is TLS13-1-2-Res-PQ-2025-09. CLI/CloudFormation/CDK default is ELBSecurityPolicy-2016-08 when SslPolicy is omitted.

service_summaries.service_name: Elastic Load Balancing - Network Load Balancer (NLB)
service_summaries.primary_crypto_configuration: TLS Listener.SslPolicy; Listener.Certificates; AlpnPolicy; TCP/TLS protocol choice
service_summaries.note: NLB has one additional legacy policy, ELBSecurityPolicy-2015-05. Use TCP 443 pass-through when targets must decrypt TLS or own mTLS.

service_summaries.primary_crypto_configuration: VPC Encryption Controls mode; Flow Logs encryption-status; Transit Gateway encryption support; exclusions
recommended_values: monitor mode for existing VPC first
risky_values: broad exclusions without compensating TLS/IPsec control
service_summaries.note: VPC is not a TLS policy service; analyze it through encryption-in-transit governance controls.

service_summaries.primary_crypto_configuration: DNSSEC signing; KSK; KMS asymmetric customer managed key; DS chain of trust; Resolver DNSSEC validation
service_summaries.api_endpoint_focus: EnableHostedZoneDNSSEC / CreateKeySigningKey / GetDNSSEC / Resolver DNSSEC validation
recommended_values: DNSSEC enabled for critical public hosted zones
DS record with ECDSAP256SHA256 type 13 and SHA-256 digest type 2
risky_values: DNSSEC disabled for critical public zone
service_summaries.note: Route 53 crypto focus is DNSSEC integrity and the KMS/KSK/DS operations chain, not TLS cipher suites.

policy_catalog.risk_reason: Allows SSLv3, TLS 1.0/1.1, 3DES, and RC4.
Allows TLS 1.0/1.1 and 3DES.
Allows TLS 1.0/1.1 and 3DES.
Minimum protocol is TLS 1.1, below modern baseline.
Minimum TLS 1.2 but still includes older compatibility ciphers.
Minimum TLS 1.2 but still includes older compatibility ciphers.
Minimum TLS 1.2; useful compatibility baseline but not newest.
Newer TLS 1.2 baseline for clients that cannot use TLS 1.3 only.
TLS 1.3 only with modern TLS 1.3 ciphers.
Does not enable TLS 1.0/1.1; assess remaining risk from cipher_profile.

recommended_values: mTLS verify for client certificate authentication
risky_values: missing trust store/CRL for mTLS verify

recommended_values: TCP 443 pass-through when targets must decrypt TLS
risky_values: IAM imported unsupported RSA key size such as RSA 4096
TCP listener assumed to terminate TLS
TLS offload when VPC Encryption Controls enforce requires target-side encryption

non_policy_configuration_items.configuration_item: VPC Encryption Controls / Flow Logs encryption-status
recommended_values: new Flow Logs with encryption-status traffic-path flow-direction

non_policy_configuration_items.configuration_item: DNSSEC signing / KSK / KMS / DS chain
optional_values: KMS ECC_NIST_P256 customer managed key in us-east-1
DS record ECDSAP256SHA256 type 13 SHA-256 type 2
recommended_values: enable DNSSEC for critical public zones
CloudWatch alarms for DNSSECInternalFailure and DNSSECKeySigningKeysNeedingAction
